_doc: Antiquities (ATQ) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/atq.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Collation: striped, 11x11 sheets; common sheet + uncommon sheet. Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Notes: Small set, 85 cards (100 counting art variations). Two print sheets only (common + uncommon); no distinct rare rarity. Page classes cards by print frequency, so composition counts left null. Printed Belgium. 60 packs per box.
